# list

```go
import "container/list"
```

Package list implements a doubly linked list.

To iterate over a list \(where l is a \*List\):

```go
for e := l.Front(); e != nil; e = e.Next() {
	// do something with e.Value
}
```

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>

```go
package main

import (
	"container/list"
	"fmt"
)

func main() {
	// Create a new list and put some numbers in it.
	l := list.New()
	e4 := l.PushBack(4)
	e1 := l.PushFront(1)
	l.InsertBefore(3, e4)
	l.InsertAfter(2, e1)

	// Iterate through list and print its contents.
	for e := l.Front(); e != nil; e = e.Next() {
		fmt.Println(e.Value)
	}

}
```

#### Output

```go
1
2
3
4
```

</p>
</details>

<a name="Element"></a>

## type [Element](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L15-L28>)

Element is an element of a linked list.

```go
type Element struct {

    // The value stored with this element.
    Value any
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="Element.Next"></a>

### func \(\*Element\) [Next](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L31>)

```go
func (e *Element) Next() *Element
```

Next returns the next list element or nil.

<a name="Element.Prev"></a>

### func \(\*Element\) [Prev](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L39>)

```go
func (e *Element) Prev() *Element
```

Prev returns the previous list element or nil.

<a name="List"></a>

## type [List](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L48-L51>)

List represents a doubly linked list. The zero value for List is an empty list ready to use.

```go
type List struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```

<a name="New"></a>

### func [New](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L62>)

```go
func New() *List
```

New returns an initialized list.

<a name="List.Back"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [Back](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L77>)

```go
func (l *List) Back() *Element
```

Back returns the last element of list l or nil if the list is empty.

<a name="List.Front"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [Front](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L69>)

```go
func (l *List) Front() *Element
```

Front returns the first element of list l or nil if the list is empty.

<a name="List.Init"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [Init](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L54>)

```go
func (l *List) Init() *List
```

Init initializes or clears list l.

<a name="List.InsertAfter"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [InsertAfter](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L169>)

```go
func (l *List) InsertAfter(v any, mark *Element) *Element
```

InsertAfter inserts a new element e with value v immediately after mark and returns e. If mark is not an element of l, the list is not modified. The mark must not be nil.

<a name="List.InsertBefore"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [InsertBefore](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L158>)

```go
func (l *List) InsertBefore(v any, mark *Element) *Element
```

InsertBefore inserts a new element e with value v immediately before mark and returns e. If mark is not an element of l, the list is not modified. The mark must not be nil.

<a name="List.Len"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [Len](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L66>)

```go
func (l *List) Len() int
```

Len returns the number of elements of list l. The complexity is O\(1\).

<a name="List.MoveAfter"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [MoveAfter](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L212>)

```go
func (l *List) MoveAfter(e, mark *Element)
```

MoveAfter moves element e to its new position after mark. If e or mark is not an element of l, or e == mark, the list is not modified. The element and mark must not be nil.

<a name="List.MoveBefore"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [MoveBefore](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L202>)

```go
func (l *List) MoveBefore(e, mark *Element)
```

MoveBefore moves element e to its new position before mark. If e or mark is not an element of l, or e == mark, the list is not modified. The element and mark must not be nil.

<a name="List.MoveToBack"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [MoveToBack](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L191>)

```go
func (l *List) MoveToBack(e *Element)
```

MoveToBack moves element e to the back of list l. If e is not an element of l, the list is not modified. The element must not be nil.

<a name="List.MoveToFront"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [MoveToFront](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L180>)

```go
func (l *List) MoveToFront(e *Element)
```

MoveToFront moves element e to the front of list l. If e is not an element of l, the list is not modified. The element must not be nil.

<a name="List.PushBack"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [PushBack](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L150>)

```go
func (l *List) PushBack(v any) *Element
```

PushBack inserts a new element e with value v at the back of list l and returns e.

<a name="List.PushBackList"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [PushBackList](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L221>)

```go
func (l *List) PushBackList(other *List)
```

PushBackList inserts a copy of another list at the back of list l. The lists l and other may be the same. They must not be nil.

<a name="List.PushFront"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [PushFront](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L144>)

```go
func (l *List) PushFront(v any) *Element
```

PushFront inserts a new element e with value v at the front of list l and returns e.

<a name="List.PushFrontList"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [PushFrontList](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L230>)

```go
func (l *List) PushFrontList(other *List)
```

PushFrontList inserts a copy of another list at the front of list l. The lists l and other may be the same. They must not be nil.

<a name="List.Remove"></a>

### func \(\*List\) [Remove](<https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/blob/main/opt/homebrew/Cellar/go/1.26.1/libexec/src/container/list/list.go#L134>)

```go
func (l *List) Remove(e *Element) any
```

Remove removes e from l if e is an element of list l. It returns the element value e.Value. The element must not be nil.
